scripts.verify:logic: node scripts/verify-menu-skeleton-logic.mjs && node scripts/verify-fridge-keep-logic.mjs && node scripts/verify-suggestions-logic.mjs && node scripts/verify-uj1-gate-logic.mjs && node scripts/verify-shopping-list-logic.mjs && node scripts/verify-plan-chrome-logic.mjs && node scripts/verify-recipe-value-logic.mjs
scripts.verify:rls: node --env-file=.env.local scripts/verify-rls-user-settings.mjs && node --env-file=.env.local scripts/verify-rls-menus.mjs && node --env-file=.env.local scripts/verify-rls-refusals-ratings.mjs && node --env-file=.env.local scripts/verify-rls-menu-snacks.mjs && node --env-file=.env.local scripts/verify-rls-shopping-lists.mjs && node --env-file=.env.local scripts/verify-rls-snack-ratings.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run verify:logic && npm run verify:rls && npm run lint && npm run build
